## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (`jowa-` class prefix, `@layer jowa.components`, `--jowa-*` tokens only)
- [ ] Component has a `.tsx` and `.css` file in `src/lib/components/<name>/`
- [ ] Component is exported from `src/lib/index.ts`
- [ ] A Storybook story is added in `src/stories/`
- [ ] TypeScript types are exported
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested in both light and dark mode
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
- [ ] `Introduction.stories.tsx` component list updated (if new component)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
